name: Archer1
description: Archaerhodopsin variant functioning as both a voltage indicator and a light-activated neuronal silencer.

kinetics.note: No quantitative tau values published; paper states kinetics 'very similar' to Arch WT. Placeholder pending better data.

dynamicRangeData.note: 85% delta F/F per 100 mV step (Fig. 1d, Supplementary Fig. 4)

brightnessData.note: Computed from molar brightness = EC640 x FQY = 41100 x 0.003 = 123.3; EGFP reference brightness = 20040

photostabilityData.note: Approximate from Supplementary Fig. 4: sensitivity measurements 56.3% -> 53.1% -> 52.7% delta F/F, retained stability over 5+5 min exposure. Used as proxy for baseline brightness.

researchPapers.title: Archaerhodopsin variants with enhanced voltage-sensitive fluorescence in mammalian and Caenorhabditis elegans neurons
researchPapers.authors: Flytzanis NC, Bedbrook CN, Chiu H, Engqvist MKM, Xiao C, Chan KY, Sternberg PW, Arnold FH, Gradinaru V
researchPapers.sample: Cultured rat hippocampal neurons, in vitro; C. elegans AWC-ON neurons, in vivo

researchPapers.title: A robotic multidimensional directed evolution approach applied to fluorescent voltage reporters
researchPapers.authors: Piatkevich KD, Jung EE, Straub C, Linghu C, Park D, Suk HJ, Hochbaum DR, Goodwin D, Pnevmatikakis E, Pak N, et al.
researchPapers.sample: HEK293T cells and cultured rat hippocampal neurons, in vitro

researchPapers.title: Comparative Evaluation of Genetically Encoded Voltage Indicators
researchPapers.authors: Bando Y, Sakamoto M, Kim S, Ayzenshtat I, Yuste R
researchPapers.sample: Mouse cortical neurons, in vitro (excluded from in vivo due to low brightness under LED/2P excitation)

researchPapers.title: Screening and Cellular Characterization of Genetically Encoded Voltage Indicators Based on Near-Infrared Fluorescent Proteins
researchPapers.authors: Monakhov MV, Matlashov ME, Colavita M, Song C, Shcherbakova DM, Antic SD, Verkhusha VV, Knöpfel T
researchPapers.sample: HEK293T cells and cultured rat hippocampal neurons, in vitro

researchPapers.title: Rational Design of Far-Red Archaerhodopsin-3-Based Fluorescent Genetically Encoded Voltage Indicators: from Elucidation of the Fluorescence Mechanism in Archers to Novel Red-Shifted Variants
researchPapers.sample: Computational modeling and HEK293T cells, in vitro

researchPapers.title: Semirational Protein Engineering Yields Archaerhodopsin-3-Based Fluorescent Genetically Encoded Voltage Indicators with Enhanced Brightness and Red Shifted Absorption Bands
researchPapers.sample: E. coli and HEK293T cells, in vitro
